leadText: Route 7 (Japanese: ７番道路 Route 7) is a route in western Kalos, connecting Route 6, Camphrier Town, and Connecting Cave. The route is also known as Rivière Walk (Japanese: リビエールライン Rivière Line).

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Name origin [ edit | edit source ] Rivière is French for river.
